commands.review_summary:
Adds a `tart` local-VM provider with CLI flags, YAML/env config, lifecycle management, cleanup/doctor support, provider registration, and unit tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking PR defect: source inspection of the PR head shows `strconv.Itoa` used in `internal/providers/tart/backend.go` while the import block omits `strconv`. The actual tart VM lifecycle was not re-run in this Linux review environment, but the PR body includes terminal lifecycle proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The blocking repair is narrow and mechanical; maintainer review can still decide provider acceptance after the branch compiles.
